about.title: Account
about.subtitle: Manage your data and settings
about.description: Here you can request your data or delete your account. All actions are immediate and secure.

requestData.title: Your Data
requestData.subtitle: Download everything we have
requestData.description: Get a complete copy of your account data — assignments, habits, notes, and everything else. We'll email you a secure download link.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This action is permanent
deleteAccount.description: Deleting your account permanently removes all your data from our servers. This action cannot be undone.

deletionConfirmation.title: Delete Account
deletionConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

onDataRequestSubmission.title: Request Submitted
onDataRequestSubmission.message: Your data is being prepared. Once ready, a secure download link will be sent to your registered email.
